modules.title: The AI Supercycle vs. Yield Gravity
modules.subtitle: Compute constraints & fiscal dominance
modules.content_html:
Systemic Divergence Detected

As we close out April 2026, the divergence between AI infrastructure CAPEX and the physical reality of sovereign debt yields has reached a critical inflection point.

Key Observations

  • Compute Constraints: Power grid limits and thermal dynamics are now the primary bottlenecks for hyperscaler expansion. The physical world is throttling the digital phase transition.
  • Yield Curve: The 10-year remains stubbornly above 4.4%, pricing in sustained fiscal dominance and structural inflation vectors.
"The market is no longer pricing in a soft landing. It is pricing in orbital mechanics and escape velocity."

— Adam Core ML Heuristic

Actionable intelligence suggests rotating capital from software-layer AI abstractions into hard asset infrastructure: uranium, copper, and specialized cooling grid tech.

modules.title: BSL Market Update
modules.subtitle: The Repricing Mirage & Phantom Liquidity
modules.content_html:
Private Credit Squeeze

The Broadly Syndicated Loan (BSL) market is experiencing a significant 'Repricing Mirage'. While top-tier issuers are clearing debt at tighter spreads, giving the illusion of a healthy market, the middle market is silently suffocating under Sponsor-to-Sponsor churn.

Vulnerability Matrix

We are tracking acute stress in the B- and CCC tranches. Default rates appear technically low on the surface, but aggressive 'amend-and-extend' activity is masking true insolvency vectors.

  • Distressed Exchanges: Up 45% YoY in the industrials sector.
  • Covenant Erosion: Lenders are trading vital structural protections for minimal yield bumps.

System Recommendation: Increase short exposure to highly leveraged BSL CLO equity tranches over the next 90 days.

modules.title: Strait Chokepoints
modules.subtitle: Maritime rerouting & supply chain stress
modules.content_html:
Global Arterial Blockage

Freight rates are inflecting upwards as kinetic disruptions in key maritime chokepoints force prolonged rerouting. The Adam heuristic has detected a 22% increase in TEU-mile inflation over the past 14 days.

Impact Vectors

This is not a temporary exogenous shock; it is a structural realignment of global supply chains. Insurance premiums for vessels transiting high-risk corridors have decoupled from historical volatility models.

WARNING // INVENTORY SHOCK IMMINENT
European manufacturing hubs are currently running on 18 days of raw material buffer, down from the 45-day historical average.

modules.title: Sovereign Hashrate Capture
modules.subtitle: BTC decoupling from legacy risk-on
modules.content_html:
The Great Migration

BTC's beta to traditional risk-on assets (like the Nasdaq 100) is severing. We are tracking massive, anomalous flows moving off-exchange into cold storage, highly correlated with sovereign wealth accumulation patterns in the Gulf and Southeast Asia.

On-Chain Forensics

  • Net Exchange Outflows: 85,000 BTC removed from centralized order books in the last 72 hours.
  • Hashrate Distribution: Further decentralization away from Western regulatory chokepoints, migrating to stranded energy hubs globally.

The system classifies this not as retail speculation, but as nation-state level reserve asset accumulation.
